name: Revival Swarm
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>蘇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>蜂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>玉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 "Battlewasp" monster in your GY; Special Summon it. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Insect monster you control; it cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects, until the end of the next turn. You can only use this effect of "Revival Swarm" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 "Battlewasp" monster in your GY; Special Summon it. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Insect monster you control; it cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects, until the end of the next turn. You can only use this effect of "Revival Swarm" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: Collection Pack: Duelist of Revolution Version

mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
